_comment: seo-keywords builds a full SEO strategy: keyword cluster, long-tail expansion, search intent, competitive gap, entity intelligence, SERP feature classification, topical authority map, and title skeleton.
description: Full SEO strategy for a content topic: keyword cluster, long-tail expansion, intent, competitor gap, entity gaps, SERP feature recommendation, topical authority architecture, and title/description skeleton.

steps.condition: caller has not already supplied a long-tail list

note: Steps 2, 5, and 6 are conditional and may be skipped if the caller has already supplied the relevant data or the condition is not met. Volume estimates are always labeled [estimated, unverified]. Competitor data carries [unverified] labels where not confirmed by retrieval.
